name.ja: <ruby>完<rt>かん</rt></ruby><ruby>全<rt>ぜん</rt></ruby>なる<ruby>世<rt>せ</rt></ruby><ruby>界<rt>かい</rt></ruby> トゥーン・ワールド

text.en: This card's name becomes "Toon World" while in the Field Zone. Once per turn: You can add 1 "Toon" card, or 1 card that mentions a "Toon" card's name, from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Toon World the Perfect World" thrice per turn. Before resolving another activated card or effect, you can banish 1 Toon monster you control until immediately after that card/effect resolves, also you cannot banish monsters with that same original name with this effect of "Toon World the Perfect World" for the rest of this turn.
text.zh-CN: 此卡名的②效果1回合最多可使用3次。①：此卡只要存在于场地区域，卡名视为“卡通世界”。②：1回合1次，在自己的主要阶段可以发动。从牌组将1张“卡通”卡或记载有该卡名的卡加入手牌。③：其他卡发动的效果将被适用之际，可将自己场上的1只卡通怪兽直至该效果处理后为止除外（此回合，不可以此卡名的此效果除外原本卡名相同的怪兽）。
